_comment: Curated schema docs for the chatbot's schema-RAG. Each entry is embedded once at ingest, then retrieved by KNN at request time and injected into the prompt. `restrictions` are merged into the always-on rules block AND surfaced alongside the retrieved chunk so the model sees them in context.

items.definition: Base fact table: one row per (date, state, company, product, unit). Scraped market/competitor listings. RLS-filtered by state. Use this table only for SKU-level detail (product_name, price, THC, flag, days_on_shelf). For brand/company/category aggregates, use chatbot_mv_market_daily — it's ~480x smaller per day.
items.restrictions: Never filter by state manually — RLS does it. Never write to this table. SCOPE: market/competitor data only, NOT own-business data.

items.definition: Security-barrier view over the daily materialized view. Pre-aggregated per (date, brand, company, category, state). Columns: date (DATE), category, brand, company, revenue (NUMERIC), quantity, sku_count, state. Use this for top brands/companies/categories, market share, category mix, multi-day trends.
items.restrictions: Prefer this view over the base table whenever the answer aggregates by brand/company/category. No SKU-level fields here.

items.definition: ISO YYYY-MM-DD string. Sorts chronologically as text. Latest snapshot: WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM complete_market_scrapper_dataset). Last N days: WHERE date >= to_char(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 'N days', 'YYYY-MM-DD').
items.restrictions: Text not DATE — don't pass directly to date arithmetic; use to_char or cast.

items.definition: US state code (VT, MA, etc).
items.restrictions: RLS-scoped automatically. Never add WHERE state = ... manually.

items.definition: Brand name (free-text). Use AND brand IS NOT NULL AND brand <> '' when grouping by brand to avoid blank buckets.
items.restrictions: Exclude blanks for any GROUP BY brand.

items.definition: Retailer/dispensary name (free-text). Same blank-filter rule as brand.
items.restrictions: Exclude blanks for any GROUP BY company.

items.definition: 58 raw variants. Always normalize with the CASE block: WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%flower%' OR lower(category) IN ('pre-packed flowers','pre-packed-flower') THEN 'Flower' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%pre%roll%' OR lower(category) IN ('preroll','prerolls') THEN 'PreRoll' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%vape%' OR lower(category) IN ('cartridge','carts','vapecarts','vape-carts','vape pens') THEN 'Vape' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%concentrate%' THEN 'Concentrate' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%edible%' THEN 'Edible' ELSE 'Other' END AS category_norm
items.restrictions: NEVER write category = 'Flower'. Always normalize via the CASE above.

items.definition: SKU display name. Use the base table (not the view) when product_name is needed.
items.restrictions: Exclude blanks when ranking.

items.definition: Pack size token: 1g, 3.5g (eighth), 7g, 28g, 1pk.
Raw displayed price ($63.00 or 45). Inconsistent — prefer price_num.
items.restrictions: Use COALESCE(price_num, NULLIF(regexp_replace(price,'[^0-9.]','','g'),'')::numeric) AS price_n for numeric work.

items.definition: Numeric price. ~15% NULL — always wrap in COALESCE(price_num, NULLIF(regexp_replace(price,'[^0-9.]','','g'),'')::numeric).
items.restrictions: Filter > 0 before averaging.

items.definition: Noisy: 24%, 100mg, 'THC -', ''. Cast: CASE WHEN thc ~ '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?%?$' THEN regexp_replace(thc,'[^0-9.]','','g')::numeric END AS thc_num, then filter thc_num BETWEEN 0 AND 100.
items.restrictions: Always cast + range-filter before averaging.

items.definition: Units listed on the scrape day.
quantity from the previous scrape. Used to derive sell-through.
Pre-baked units sold (pack-size normalized). Use for sell-through.
price_num * |change|. Inferred market sell-through, NOT POS revenue.
items.restrictions: Default ranking metric for top/best/biggest.

items.definition: added | no change | removed | NULL (15%). Use flag = 'added' / flag = 'removed' for new/dropped products.
Days since first seen. 38% NULL — filter IS NOT NULL when sorting/aggregating. ASC = fastest moving; DESC = stale.
items.restrictions: Always WHERE days_on_shelf IS NOT NULL when sorted/aggregated.

items.definition: First scrape timestamp for the SKU.
Row ingestion timestamp.
Real DATE — date arithmetic works directly. WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '14 days'.
Brand grouping key. Exclude blanks: brand IS NOT NULL AND brand <> ''.
items.restrictions: Exclude blanks for any GROUP BY brand.

items.definition: Retailer grouping key.
items.restrictions: Exclude blanks for any GROUP BY company.

items.definition: Same 58 raw variants — normalize via the standard CASE block.
items.restrictions: NEVER write category = 'Flower'. Always normalize.

items.definition: Daily sum of base-table revenue per (brand, company, category, state).
items.restrictions: Default ranking metric.

items.definition: Daily sum of base-table quantity.
Distinct SKUs per grouping. Use SUM(sku_count) when grouping by brand for 'most products listed'.
US state code. RLS-scoped.
items.restrictions: Never filter by state manually.

items.definition: MySQL tenant ops table — one row per order line item. Columns include date (DATETIME), customerName, productName, qty, unitPrice, subtotal, status ('Completed'|'Pending'|'Cancelled'), openBalance, brand_id, tenantid. Use for: open orders, completed orders, customer revenue, sales by product. The user's OWN orders.
items.restrictions: Tenant predicate is auto-injected — never write tenantid yourself. Do NOT scope by brand_id (collides cross-tenant). Use ANSI single-quotes for strings.

items.definition: MySQL tenant ops table — current on-hand inventory snapshot. One row per (productName, tenant). Columns: productName, strain, productType, lotNumber, current_qty, pending, remaining, lbs, updatedAt, tenantid. Use for: low stock, what's in stock, on-hand units by product.
items.restrictions: Tenant predicate is auto-injected. Latest snapshot only — no history.

items.definition: MySQL tenant ops table — lot tracking. One row per (lotNumber, tenant). Columns: strain, lotNumber, thc, tac, terps, expirationDate, internalLotId, ccbLotNumber, tenantid. Use for: THC by strain, expiring lots, lot metadata.
items.restrictions: Tenant predicate is auto-injected.

items.definition: MySQL tenant brand registry. Columns: id (cuid), name, isRhize (tinyint — 1 = the user's OWN brand, 0 = competitor brand in their catalog), createdAt, tenantid. Use for: the tenant's own brand (isRhize=1), brand catalog list. Unique on (tenantid, name).
items.restrictions: Tenant predicate is auto-injected. For the user's OWN brand identity filter `WHERE isRhize = 1`.

items.definition: MySQL tenant store registry — retail stores the tenant sells to. Columns: name, slug, licenseNumber, address, city, phone, contactName, isPartner (tinyint — 1 = partner agreement), tier, tenantid. Use for: partner stores, retail accounts, store directory.
items.restrictions: Tenant predicate is auto-injected.

items.definition: MySQL tenant partner store roster (minimal). Columns: customer_name, created_at, updated_at, tenantid. Use for: partner customer list.
items.restrictions: Tenant predicate is auto-injected.

items.definition: MySQL tenant strain metadata. Columns: strain, effectTag (RELAX, ENERGIZE, etc), genetics1, genetics2, breeder, flavor1/2/3, tenantid. Use for: strain genetics, flavor profile, effect tags.
items.restrictions: Tenant predicate is auto-injected.

items.definition: MySQL tenant CRM action queue. Columns: customerName, category (MARKET, OUTREACH, etc), priority (int, 1=highest), description, status (New, In Progress, Done), notes, offerSent, lastUpdated, tenantid. Use for: open sales actions, follow-ups, CRM queue.
items.restrictions: Tenant predicate is auto-injected.

items.definition: MySQL tenant sales aggregate table — the tenant's OWN sales / revenue data. Legacy: all numeric columns stored as TEXT — must CAST(col AS DECIMAL(10,2)) for math. Columns: Company_Name, Product_Name, Category, Type, Days, Flag (Added/Removed/No Change), Unit, Price, Discount_Price_Data, `Today's_Quantity_Total`, `1d`, `3d`, `7d`, `14d`, THC, SKU, Change, Revenue, date (TEXT YYYY-MM-DD), tenantid, brand_id. Use for: 'my revenue', 'my sales', daily totals, top products by tenant.
items.restrictions: Tenant predicate is auto-injected. Backtick digit-leading columns (`1d`, `3d`, `7d`, `14d`, `Today's_Quantity_Total`). Cast Price / Revenue to DECIMAL for math. `date` is TEXT — compare lexicographically or DATE_FORMAT a date-arithmetic expression.

items.definition: MySQL tenant per-store data (slimmer than dataset_main). Columns: date (TEXT), Product_Name, Category, Type, Company_Name (store), SKU, tenantid, brand_id. Use for: per-store breakdown of the tenant's products.
items.restrictions: Tenant predicate is auto-injected. `date` is TEXT YYYY-MM-DD.

items.definition: Order status: 'Completed', 'Pending', 'Cancelled'. Common filters: WHERE status = 'Completed' (revenue), WHERE status <> 'Completed' (open).
Order date. Compare directly to CURRENT_DATE / DATE_SUB(...). Last 30 days: WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 30 DAY).
Retail store name on the order. Use lower(customerName) LIKE lower('%X%') for case-insensitive partial match. Group by customerName for top-customers-by-revenue queries.
Line revenue (qty × unitPrice). SUM(subtotal) for total revenue. Combine with WHERE status = 'Completed' for realized revenue.
Unpaid balance per line. SUM(openBalance) for total AR. Usually filter status <> 'Completed' for outstanding.
Units sold on this line.
On-hand units. Low stock: WHERE current_qty < N. ORDER BY current_qty ASC.
Product name. Unique per (productName, tenant).
current_qty - pending. Available-to-sell units.
THC percentage. Already numeric (no cast needed). NULL-safe: WHERE thc IS NOT NULL when averaging.
Lot expiry. Expiring soon: WHERE expirationDate BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 30 DAY).
Strain name. Aggregates: AVG(thc) GROUP BY strain.
Flag: 1 = the user's OWN brand, 0 = competitor in their catalog. For 'my brand' / 'my own brand' questions filter WHERE isRhize = 1.
Brand name. Unique per (tenantid, name).
Flag: 1 = partner store. For 'my partner stores' filter WHERE isPartner = 1.
Store city.
'New', 'In Progress', 'Done'. Open queue: WHERE status <> 'Done'.
1 = highest. ORDER BY priority ASC.
Daily revenue, stored as TEXT. ALWAYS cast: CAST(Revenue AS DECIMAL(10,2)). SUM(CAST(Revenue AS DECIMAL(10,2))) for totals. This is the tenant's OWN revenue.
items.restrictions: Cast to DECIMAL(10,2) for any math.

items.definition: Unit price, stored as TEXT. Cast: CAST(Price AS DECIMAL(10,2)).
items.restrictions: Cast to DECIMAL(10,2) for any math.

items.definition: YYYY-MM-DD string. Compare as text (sorts chronologically). Last 7 days: WHERE date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAY, '%Y-%m-%d'). Latest: WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM rhize_dataset_main).
items.restrictions: Text not DATE — use DATE_FORMAT for date arithmetic comparisons.

items.definition: 'Added', 'Removed', 'No Change'. Today's new SKUs: WHERE Flag = 'Added' AND date = (SELECT MAX(date)…).
